en.name: OP-SKS "Relic Reborn"
en.description: Once a civilian Molot OP-SKS hunting carbine chambered in 7.62x39, this rifle spent decades in the field taking game instead of lives. That changed when Tony got hold of it. After rebuilding the fire control group and reworking the action in his workshop, the old rifle was pushed far beyond its original limits. Now capable of fully automatic fire, the SKS roars back to life as something far more dangerous. Tony calls it "Relic Reborn" — a forgotten warhorse reminded what it was made for.
